About me

I am an AI researcher at Basecamp Research, a London based biotech using AI to develop therapeutics from biological sequences found in nature. This website serves as a dump of my thoughts. It is a digital version of a scratch pad, thus one can expect it to be messy, incomplete, and in constant flux. If any of the material is particularly interesting or useful to you then please contact me immediately as that was not the intention.

books.

Reach out (I'll be there)
